content.en:
Airplanes!!!!

As soon as Ye Tian began to comprehend the Chaos Stone Carving, the consciousness of the whole person entered the Chaos Stone Carving.

At this time, Ye Tian witnessed a large number of chaotic law trajectories.

In the universe, there is no real law of chaos, and the law of chaos is a law formed by the fusion of many laws.

But in chaos, this is not the case, but there are laws of chaos first, and then they slowly evolve into other laws.

So, in the universe and chaos, the two are not the same.

At this time, Ye Tian witnessed the operation of the law of chaos in chaos, and under the influence of the chaos stone carvings, Ye Tian's comprehension improved many times, and his understanding of the law of chaos and the avenue of chaos far exceeded usual.

At the same time, Ye Tian also saw a picture of a figure sitting cross-legged on top of the lotus flower, which was a chaotic law condensed by countless chaotic laws.

It's not a real picture, it's just a picture evolved from the Chaos Stone Carvings.

With such a picture, Ye Tian could completely create a similar Chaos True Technique based on the Chaos Law contained in this picture, which was much easier than creating a Chaos True Technique out of thin air.

But even so, the difficulty is very high, and there are only three years, and if you can't use time acceleration, then the difficulty is even greater.

"The girl's machine spirit is not allowed to use time acceleration, but it doesn't say that it is not allowed to use other foreign objects. I have a talent for comprehension, and I can increase my perception by 20 times, although the effect may not be able to increase too much, but at least it is effective. "

So, Ye Tian opened the talent of comprehension.

After his comprehension increased, Ye Tian began to try the Creation Chaos True Technique.

He starts with simple actions to create, fails again and again, and summarizes again and again.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian initially created an attack method, which was to use the law of chaos to condense into a shield and form a means of defense.

But when he created it and released it, he was told by the machine spirit that it was not qualified.

"The method you created has not reached the minimum threshold of the Chaos True Technique, and it can only be regarded as a Chaos Minor Secret Technique. "

The voice of the maiden's machine spirit came.

Failed!

But Ye Tian didn't care, it was only a year in the past, and he still had two years.

In this way, another year has passed, but Ye Tian still failed.

At this time, Ye Tian began to get anxious.

There was only one year left, and at this rate, one year would not be enough at all, and his hopes of creating the Chaos True Technique were very low.

"Figure, lotus, lotus, yes, Chaos Black Lotus. My Chaos Black Lotus is definitely from Chaos, and it is actually full of Chaos Laws, but it is too advanced for me to understand. If it is combined with the Chaos Stone Carving, and then you go to the Enlightenment to create the Chaos True Technique, it may have an effect. "

Come to think of it.

Ye Tian's consciousness entered the Chaos Black Lotus in the Chaos Ancient Realm, and the other part of his consciousness was connected to the Chaos Stone Carving.

Combining the two, I began to come to my senses.

Soon, Ye Tian had countless insights and shocks.

The laws contained in the Chaos Black Lotus are higher than those contained in the Chaos Stone Carvings, and after the analysis of the Chaos Stone Carvings, Ye Tian gradually understood some of the laws of the Chaos Black Lotus.

In this way, Ye Tian was silent in the Chaos Black Lotus and Chaos Stone Carvings, and went all out to create the Chaos True Technique.

Before you know it, another year is almost over.

There was only half a month left before the three-year deadline, and on this day, Ye Tian showed a happy smile.

"It's finally created, and this time it's definitely a real Chaos True Technique!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he began to perform this real skill.

"Black Lotus Realm!"

Bang!!!!

A black lotus appeared out of thin air, and it was a black lotus formed entirely by the laws of chaos.

In an instant, the petals of the black lotus splashed, forming an enchantment, and the enchantment began to shrink, crushing the central void.

Although the power of this move is not as powerful as the Heavenly Moon Sword, nor is it as powerful as the Hell Divine Sky Spear, and the speed of casting it is a little slow, it is indeed a peerless or true skill.

The rest can only wait for the evaluation of the girl's machine spirit!

Soon, the voice of the maiden machine spirit came: "After testing, what the assessor created is an enchantment attack type chaos true skill, which has reached the assessment standard of chaos true skill, and the assessment is successful!"

Hearing the words successful assessment, Ye Tian finally breathed a sigh of relief.

If he fails the assessment, he will need to face the threat of the Dark Ape, and even if he escapes the pursuit of the Dark Ape, he will miss this opportunity forever.

It's a pity to miss the opportunity.

Fortunately, he successfully passed the assessment, and as for what the reward will be after the completion of the assessment, he is full of expectations.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian was teleported back to the previous hall.

Here, he met the Maiden Machine Spirit.

At this time, the girl looked at Ye Tian in great surprise: "I didn't expect that you really passed the assessment! This universe is still relatively young, I thought it would take a long time to wait for the Golden Desolate Hall to really come out and be known by countless beings in the universe, and then a cosmic creature who passed the assessment will be slowly born." Unexpectedly, this is only the third cosmic creature, and there is an assessor who has passed the assessment. Could it be that your cosmic era is very powerful, and there are countless geniuses?"

Ye Tian hurriedly said, "I should be regarded as the most talented person in this universe at the moment!"

"I see, it seems that the Golden Desolation Hall is lucky, and it has ushered in a reserve successor so soon!"

The girl is spiritual.

"What do you mean?"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

The girl said: "Let me tell you the origin of the Golden Desolate Palace, the Golden Desolate Hall was created by the master of the Golden Desolate Old Man, and there is not only this Golden Desolate Palace, but many Golden Desolate Palaces. In the midst of chaos, there are many universes like yours. The master has built many Golden Desolation Palaces and placed them not far from the universe, and when the universe continues to expand, it will engulf the Golden Desolation Palace. This is also one of the only ways to let the Golden Desolate Hall enter the universe, after all, even the master can't actually enter the interior of the universe. The reason why the master wanted to send the Golden Desolate Hall into the universe was to find a suitable cosmic creature successor, strictly speaking, a cosmic transcendent. Of course, what the master is looking for is not the most ordinary cosmic transcendent, but a transcendent who is very rebellious in all aspects. "

After talking with the girl machine spirit, Ye Tian gradually understood a little bit about the cosmic transcendent, and learned a very amazing secret.

In the midst of chaos, there is a wider world, and of course, the competition is more intense.

And in the chaos, there is no limit to wanting to become a realm above the supreme level, as long as the talent is reached, you can become such an existence.

However, in the chaos, even if you become an existence above the supreme level, you are not considered a transcendent.

Only beings who are detached from the universe can be regarded as cosmic detached, such people are not limited by fate, and have unlimited potential in the future.

In fact, this has something to do with transcending time and space, the soul imprint of cosmic beings exists in the long river of time and space of the universe, and the soul imprint of living beings in chaos exists in the long river of chaotic time and space.

The long river of time and space beyond the universe is relatively simple, but how vast and powerful the chaos is, even if it surpasses the existence above the supreme, it is just like an ant in the face of chaos.

Therefore, it is too difficult and too difficult to jump out of the chaotic space-time, but it is many times easier to transcend the space-time of the universe.

Therefore, once you transcend time and space in the universe and enter chaos, you belong to the transcendent.

The potential of the transcendent is very terrifying, once they enter the chaos, their strength will increase extremely fast, and they will not be limited by fate, and they are the envy of countless chaotic beings.

The master of the Golden Desolation Hall is to cultivate a cosmic transcendent, and he is not an ordinary transcendent.

That's why the assessment of the Golden Desolate Hall is so perverted.

As for who the owner of the Golden Desolate Hall was, and what realm it was, the girl didn't say much.

"Assessor, you have passed the assessment, and you are fortunate to get a copy of the inheritance left by the master, but you have not yet become a real detached person, and you cannot know everything about the master. After you become a transcendent, come to the Golden Desolation Palace, and when the time comes, everything will be told to you!"

The girl is spiritual.

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the maiden machine spirit retrieved two things.

One is a Chaos Stone Carving, and the other is a Golden Book.

"This golden book records the secret of the transcendent and the master's most proud Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, which is a very powerful true method in the chaos, and can be cultivated all the way to the realm of the Transcendent. Its main use is to expand the limits of the physical body, which is very important in the midst of chaos. Therefore, you will have to cultivate more Chaos Golden Desolation Techniques in the future!"

The girl said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately put away the Chaos Stone Carving and the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

When Ye Tian put away these two things, the whole person was moved out and came to the outside of the Golden Desolate Palace.

"Cosmic creature, you actually passed the assessment??"

The Dark Heavenly Ape appeared, staring at Ye Tian in shock.

"Luckily passed!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

"I mean what I say, you actually passed the assessment of the Golden Desolate Palace, then you can be regarded as the master's reserve successor, and I naturally can't deal with you anymore!"

Dark Celestial Ape Dao.

"Then I'll leave first!"

Ye Tian said goodbye.

"Don't be in a hurry, I intimidated you before, I'll take you to a good place, just take it as an apology, how about it?"

The Dark Celestial Ape hurriedly said.

"Okay!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed in his heart and said.

Immediately.

The Dark Celestial Ape grabbed Ye Tian and shuttled through the void at an extremely fast speed.

It didn't take long for the Dark Celestial Ape to take Ye Tian into the depths of the underground again, and soon came to an underground space.

Here, Ye Tian saw the corpse of a chaotic creature, whose power was no weaker than that of the previous dominant-level creature.

"This is the lair of the Celestial Mangbeast, and it is also one of the overlords of this small world, but unfortunately it didn't know that this world would be swallowed by the universe, so it didn't leave early and died here. Its lair has good stuff and it should help you!"

The Dark Ape said.
